name: amiberry-jit-fix
description: ARM64 JIT compiler fixes for Amiberry (GitHub issue #1766). This skill captures the complete technical knowledge from 20+ debugging sessions that identified and fixed: (a) a page 0 DMA corruption crash during A1200 Kickstart boot, (b) visual corruption (black gadgets, garbled text) caused by incorrect inter-block flag optimization, and (c) SIGSEGV crashes on unmapped natmem gaps (e.g., 0x00F10000) in complex configs with hardfiles/RTG. Use this skill when working on: (1) the JIT_DEBUG_MEM_COR...
